title: Audit finding schema
description: Canonical per-finding object that plumbline produces and the Jinja2 templates consume. Code4rena is the default target; per-platform notes in templates/PLATFORM_NOTES.md describe mappings to Sherlock/Immunefi/Cantina/Spearbit/TOB.

id.description: Code4rena format: <SEV>-<NN> zero-padded. H-01, M-03, etc. SEV ∈ {H, M, L} per docs.code4rena.com. Sherlock uses different IDs; convert at render time.

severity.description: Code4rena severity bucket. Sherlock translates: HIGH = users lose >1% AND >$10 principal; MEDIUM = >0.01% AND >$10 OR core-functionality break; both impact-only, no likelihood.

title.description: Title-case, action-oriented. Plumbline default: invariant_name + spec_name + ' on ' + contract_name. E.g.: 'NoOverpayment violated in SignatureReplay-shaped withdraw flow on L1BossBridge'.

source_issue_url.description: URL to original finding submission. For Code4rena: github.com/code-423n4/<slug>-findings/issues/<n>. For solo audits, can be the plumbline rep_id link or a Notion/Linear URL.

duplicates.description: Optional list of duplicate submitters. Empty for solo work.

description.description: Optional. Code4rena: appears before Impact when included. Treat as `## Description` slot; plumbline default: matched FailureMode shape's bug-class description.

impact.description: REQUIRED. What concretely happens — funds lost, system bricked, user impersonated. Plumbline default: derived from sol_intent lead text + TLC counterexample's first violation state. For Sherlock, must concretely quantify (>1% of principal etc) to fit High; otherwise downgrade to Medium per their impact-only rubric.

poc.description: REQUIRED. For C4 H/M: must be runnable (Foundry test or diff against project test suite). Plumbline default: TLC counterexample state-trace formatted as Foundry test stub. For Sherlock: same expectation.

poc_diff_path.description: Optional path to runnable PoC diff (e.g. test/exploits/H-01.t.sol). If present, rendered as an additional 'See the runnable PoC diff' line.

mitigation.description: REQUIRED. Specific code change recommended. Plumbline default: derived from the matched FailureMode spec's 'correct' action (the non-buggy branch in our TLA+ spec). E.g.: 'add a per-signature consumed flag set before transfer; check before accept.'

tools_used.description: Optional. Plumbline default: 'TLC model checker on plumbline\'s <SpecName> FailureMode + manual review' for shape-discharged findings; 'Anthropic Claude Sonnet via plumbline\'s sol_intent + RAG over .ANSWERS history' for lead-driven findings.

severity_rationale.description: Optional. Why this severity bucket. Required by Code4rena if severity is contestable; required by Sherlock for any High.

references.description: Optional external citations. Plumbline auto-fills with relevant past .ANSWERS findings via RAG retrieval.

path.description: Path within the contest scope, e.g., src/L1BossBridge.sol

permalink.description: github.com/code-423n4/<slug>/blob/<commit>/<path>#L<start>-L<end> or equivalent permalink format for other platforms

code_citations.description: Code citations. Code4rena format: ContractName.sol#Lstart-Lend rendered as markdown link to the in-scope code-423n4 repo at the audit's pinned commit.

plumbline_provenance.description: OPTIONAL plumbline-specific block. NOT rendered into the final audit report — used internally for auditing the auditor.
